overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character traversing a frozen lake surrounded by snow-covered mountains and orange autumn trees, approaching and entering a traditional Japanese wooden building. The scene transitions from bright outdoor winter landscape to dimly lit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen lake surrounded by autumn forest and snow-capped mountains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the frozen lake toward a distant traditional Japanese building

entered.detail: large snow-capped mountain range forming the backdrop
expansive frozen lake with visible ice cracks and reflections
trees with bright orange foliage lining the lake shore
wooden Japanese building with snow-covered roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a vast frozen lake under a clear blue sky, surrounded by snow-covered mountains and vibrant orange autumn trees. The traditional Japanese building sits in the distance as the camera follows steadily from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden walkway leading to traditional Japanese house entrance

events.description: character steps off the frozen lake onto snow-covered ground and wooden walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden path toward the house entrance, passing stone lanterns

notable_agents.action: two villagers standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: elevated wooden path leading from the lake shore to the house entrance
traditional Japanese stone lantern beside the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the frozen lake to a wooden walkway surrounded by snow, approaching the traditional building. Two NPCs stand near the entrance as the house grows larger in the frame, with stone lanterns marking the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of traditional Japanese house with paper lanterns

events.description: character passes through red entrance curtains into the dimly lit building interior

agents.ego_description: passing through the entrance curtains into the building, approaching a figure inside

notable_agents.action: person standing inside the building near the far wall

entered.detail: traditional red noren curtains marking the building entrance
polished wooden floorboards inside the building
illuminated paper lanterns hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters the traditional building through red curtains, transitioning from bright winter sunlight to a dim interior illuminated by hanging paper lanterns. A figure stands in the distance inside the wooden structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, frozen wilderness into the dim sanctuary of a traditional Japanese building. It begins by trailing a character across a frozen lake under a clear blue sky, framed by snow-capped mountains and vibrant orange autumn trees. As the character advances, the terrain shifts from the ice to a snow-lined wooden walkway marked by stone lanterns, bringing the distant house into sharp focus as NPCs stand guard at the entrance. The scene then transitions through red curtains, moving from the bright winter sunlight into a dimly lit interior. Finally, the environment opens into a wooden hall illuminated by hanging paper lanterns, where a solitary figure awaits in the distance.
